alkylation reagent: Cells were lysed in the presence of free thiol blocking reagent N-ethylmaleimide (NEM).
enrichment method: loaded to Handee Mini-Spin columns containing 30 mg of preconditioned thiopropyl sepharose 6B resin.
instrument: MS analysis was performed on a Thermo Scientific LTQ-Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer.
ionization type: coupled with an electrospray ionization interface
labeling: on-resin tryptic digestion and isobaric labeling with 6-plex tandem mass tags (TMT).
